user.title: Set up HomePod Sensors
user.description:
Your iOS Shortcut should POST to this webhook URL every {update_interval} minutes:

```
{webhook_url}
```

See the README for the full Shortcut setup guide and importable template.

Set the update interval below (how often your iOS Shortcut will run).

data_description.update_interval: How often the iOS Shortcut pushes sensor data. Devices are marked stale after 3× this value.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one HomePod Sensors instance is supported. It manages all HomePod Minis in your Apple Home.

data_description.update_interval: How often the iOS Shortcut pushes sensor data. Staleness threshold = 3× this value.
